---

## Connector Details

- **Tool name:**
- **Category:** (communication / crm / database / devops / etc.)
- **API documentation URL:**
- **Authentication type:** (API key / OAuth2 / Basic / Bearer)

## Proposed Actions

What actions should this connector support?

| Action | Description | Dangerous? |
|--------|-------------|-----------|
| list_items | List all items | No |
| create_item | Create a new item | Yes |
| ... | ... | ... |

## Why This Connector?

- How many developers would use this?
- Is there an existing SDK or just a REST API?
- Are sandbox/test accounts available?

## Contribution

- [ ] I would like to contribute this connector
- [ ] I need help implementing it
